pageDesc: Review and revert past physical organization and renaming actions.
emptyDesc: Reversible file organization batches will be listed here.
confirmDesc: This will physically move and rename all successfully organized files back to their previous naming scheme and folders.
confirmWarning: Are you sure you want to revert this batch?
revertDisabledTooltip: Only the most recent batch can be reverted to prevent file structure conflicts.
alreadyRevertedTooltip: This batch has already been reverted.
undoActiveProgress: Reverting batch organization files in the background...
